description: Welcome home to Denim, a sought-after townhouse community in the heart of Willoughby! This pristine 3 bedroom, 2 bath home is designed for everyday comfort, with an open main floor where large windows fill your space with natural light. Upstairs, your primary bedroom feels like a retreat with its vaulted ceiling and private ensuite, plus the ease of laundry right where you need it—on the bedroom level. Downstairs, your rec room opens to a backyard patio and grassy area, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Pet-friendly complex with playground, basketball court, and clubhouse, all just minutes from amenities and easy highway access. This is a turnkey home in a fantastic location!
